name: Logo Wall
description: Drop in a pile of logos and arrange them into a clean, even wall — size, fade or grayscale each, or threshold them all into flat vector shapes. Your images stay on your device.

inputs.label: Columns
inputs.help: How many logos sit in each row.

inputs.label: Padding
inputs.help: Breathing room around the whole wall.

inputs.label: Balance sizes
inputs.help: Auto-size each logo by its optical weight — heavier logos shrink, lighter ones grow — so the wall reads as evenly weighted. Each logo's own Size % still applies on top. Turn off for uniform sizing.

inputs.label: Ink colour
inputs.help: The single ink for any logo set to “Render as vector” (per logo, below).

inputs.label: Vector threshold
inputs.help: Default brightness cut-off for vector logos. Higher keeps more of each logo; tune a finnicky one per logo below.

inputs.label: Vector invert
inputs.help: Default for vector logos — swap which side of the threshold becomes ink. White / pale logos are auto-inverted, so you rarely need this; tune per logo below if one needs it.

inputs.label: Vector detail
inputs.help: Default tracing resolution for vector logos. Higher captures finer shapes but is heavier.

inputs.label: Vector smoothing
inputs.help: Default for vector logos: how much traced outlines round into curves. Low keeps edges crisp; high flows them into smooth Bézier curves.

fields.label: Render as vector
fields.help: Flatten this logo to the single ink colour (crisp vector). Off keeps it as its original image.

fields.label: Tune this logo
fields.help: Give this logo its own vector settings — for finnicky marks that need a different threshold or inverting.

fields.label: Threshold
fields.help: Brightness cut-off for this logo. Higher keeps more of it.

fields.label: Invert
fields.help: For a white or pale logo.
